message: just tired.
idk.
not great.
kind of a lot.
nothing feels real.
My best friend completely ignored me when I needed her most. I'm done.
I feel like a burden to everyone around me.
I said something stupid in front of everyone and I can't stop thinking about it.
I've been crying every day for two weeks and I don't even know why.
I feel like I'm disappearing and nobody notices.

My relationship is falling apart and I cannot talk to anyone about it because we have mutual friends and anything I say gets back to him and I am so exhausted from pretending everything is fine every single day. I don't even recognise myself anymore. I just want it to stop.

I got a diagnosis today. I don't really know how to feel. I've been sitting with it for hours and every time I think I'm okay I'm not. My family doesn't know yet and I have no idea how to even say it.

I moved to a new city six months ago and I still don't have any friends. I go to work, come home, and that's it. I thought it would get easier but it just keeps feeling more and more hollow. I spend every weekend alone and I'm starting to wonder if something is wrong with me.

I work so hard and nothing ever changes. I've been at this job for three years, I've asked for a promotion twice, I've gotten nothing. My coworkers who started after me are ahead of me. I do everything right and it still doesn't matter. I don't know why I bother anymore.

I had a huge fight with my mom last night and I said things I can't take back. She said things too but I keep replaying my part. I know I was wrong but I was so angry I couldn't stop. Now she isn't answering my calls and I feel sick about it.
is it weird that I feel relieved and sad at the same time?
am I being dramatic?
do you ever get tired of people dumping their problems on you?
why does everything feel so much heavier at night?
is it normal to miss someone who hurt you this much?
Sometimes I wonder if people would even notice if I just... wasn't around.
I don't see the point in any of this anymore. Every day feels exactly the same and I'm just so done.
I've been thinking about just disappearing. Not dying, just... leaving everything and everyone behind.
I haven't eaten properly in four days. I can't make myself care about anything.
I keep having these thoughts I don't want to have. I don't know how to make them stop.
